name: New York New York's Chicken Francaise
recipeIngredient: 8 Chicken breast pieces (3.5 oz each), boned and skinned
Margarine or butter for coating pan
recipeInstructions:
1. Dust the chicken in flour and set aside.
2. Make the batter by beating eggs briskly, then adding lemon juice, parsley, salt, white wine, garlic puree, hot pepper sauce, and Parmesan cheese.
3. Coat a heavy skillet with margarine or olive oil.
4. Place skillet over high heat and dip the floured chicken pieces generously in the batter.
5. Place the coated chicken pieces in the heated skillet and cook until golden brown on each side, about 5 minutes.
6. Remove the chicken from the pan and drain excess oil.
7. Make the wine sauce by melting margarine in the pan, then stirring in white wine and lemon juice.
8. Return the chicken pieces to the pan, spooning the wine sauce over all.
9. Cook for an additional minute.
10. Serve immediately.
